default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss marketing strategies and conference planning for Vapi, focusing on enterprise customer acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to enterprise customers while leveraging self-serve community for product innovation](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Implement multi-pronged approach: relationship building, creating FOMO, and demonstrating problem-solving capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Develop targeted programs (e.g., happy hours, dinners) to engage enterprise prospects and create brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Improve website and marketing materials to clearly showcase enterprise focus and customer logos](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

## Topics

### Enterprise Marketing Strategy

  - [Prioritize enterprise-focused messaging and content](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Create relationship-building opportunities (e.g., dinners, events)](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Generate FOMO through showcasing enterprise logos and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Demonstrate problem-solving capabilities with case studies and customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Leverage self-serve community innovations to appeal to enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Website and Content Optimization

  - [Make enterprise focus more prominent on the homepage](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Add clear path for enterprise visitors (e.g., "Schedule a Demo" button)](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Showcase enterprise customer logos and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Create dedicated enterprise-focused pages and materials](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Lead Generation and Outreach

  - [Implement tools like Common Room or Koala to track high-intent website visitors](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Use trigger-based, warm outbound outreach based on website activity](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Leverage product usage data for personalized enterprise outreach](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Target engineers and decision-makers from enterprise companies for events and communications](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)

### Conference Strategy

  - [Attend 3-4 major enterprise-focused conferences annually (e.g., Contact Center Week)](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Plan for significant investment (\~$100k) for effective presence at top conferences](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Host AI-focused happy hours to attract enterprise attendees and create buzz](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Organize exclusive dinners for VP-level and above prospects](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Vapicon Conference Planning

  - [Set for October 2nd with a goal of 500 attendees (currently at 150)](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Treat conference promotion like launching a podcast season](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Leverage existing email database for promotion](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Consider creating a separate enterprise-focused email list for targeted communications](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Revise website to prominently feature enterprise focus and customer logos](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Develop targeted programs (happy hours, dinners) for enterprise prospects](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Create an enterprise-specific email list and communication strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Research and plan attendance at key enterprise-focused conferences](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Continue Vapicon planning with weekly promotion and speaker recruitment efforts](https://fathom.video/share/1dyJnfobE8hQGyqoAxv8dPoPs-MxU2Bt?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

action_items.description: Update website - add clear enterprise path, showcase logos, add demo scheduling option for enterprises
Continue weekly Vapicon conf planning - promote, get registrants, secure speakers, leverage email database
Create subset of email database for enterprise engineers' emails only
